abstract_summary: Long-lived LLM agents increasingly act through tools, APIs, and external environments. While long-term memory helps agents accumulate experience, textual memories are retrieved probabilistically and may fail to prevent previously observed tool-use violations when context is diluted, retrieval is incomplete, or memor...
